description: Composition Black shawl neck top made of 100% cotton, sleeveless, has graphic print on the right side, a drawstring above the hem and embroidered branding at the back Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with like colours Do not bleach, tumble, iron and dry clean This black shawl neck cotton top from puma with an uber cool chest print is a great summery choice. Team it with skinny jeans or denim shorts to make heads turn. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
